description: The largest human society, millions deep beneath the surface in caste darkness. Talents rule from pleasure domes while modified Drones never see the sun; propaganda, drugs, and cloning have split them into near-species. Echoes are commerce, not reverence—except to drones who see Wormwood as escape.

cards.name: Agromechs
cards.card_effect: Gain +1 T during your growth phase for every health on this unit.

cards.name: Graft Necrosis
cards.card_effect: Target unit loses 1 health for every augment attached to it.
cards.flavor_text: A bad graft could die in hours - taking the host to hell in a span of an afternoon.

cards.name: Creche Harvest
cards.card_effect: Place 2 D on this card from the Creche.
cards.flavor_text: Little bodies in the Drone pens, faces pressed tight against the glass.

cards.name: Critical Shot
cards.card_effect: Scrap one health from target unit.

cards.name: Crustcracker Gang
cards.card_effect: During your growth phase, scrap one health from Crustcracker Gang.
cards.flavor_text: Convicts, layabouts, aristocrats, kings - every man is born again in the acid of the mines.

cards.name: Flamer Crew
cards.card_effect: Splash (When this unit deals combat damage, deal the same damage to the next enemy unit.)
cards.flavor_text: A grendel will burn just like anything else. The smell isn’t much of a reward.

cards.name: Flystrikers
cards.card_effect: If this unit is dealt combat damage, scrap one health from the attacking unit.
cards.flavor_text: A boiling nanite cloud - black as tar, hissing and roiling like hate, rising from the bodies...

cards.name: Geneforge Nurses
cards.card_effect: Add +1D to your Citadel during your growth phase.
cards.flavor_text:
Midwives to the spliced abominations of an overripe society...
-Inquisitor Sandoval, ‘The plank and the splinter’

cards.name: Homo Superior
cards.card_effect: You may scrap a D from your Citadel to deal +2 damage when resolving a combat with this unit.
cards.flavor_text:
New monsters in old flesh, these so called ‘men’.
-Malachai Renquist, Neogenesis Bishop

cards.name: Husk Harvesters
cards.card_effect: Each time you score an Echo you may add 1 to a card in your Forge.
cards.flavor_text: Harvesters follow the flame squads into the spore mats, digging through ashes for such a little thing...

cards.name: Hypnobar
cards.card_effect: Flip T after leaving this facility. Any D leaving this facility are scrapped.
cards.flavor_text: The hypnostims were created to bring addicts back from the brink - now death is preferable to prohibition.

cards.name: Iron Tortoise
cards.card_effect:
Units behind Iron Tortoise gain +1 Armor.
Slow (If this unit takes lethal combat damage, it does not deal damage in return.)

cards.name: Lowhivers
cards.card_effect:
This unit gains one D from your Citadel during your growth phase.
During your upkeep, flip a T on the Citadel or scrap Lowhivers.

cards.name: Mandatory Stims
cards.card_effect: Move all citizens from a facility to its controller’s Citadel.
cards.flavor_text: Do the stims help us work longer? Or better? Should we be grateful we retain the neural capacity to question?

cards.name: Mantle Bore
cards.card_effect: D: Add 1 to every card in target Forge.
cards.flavor_text:
The drops of rain make a hole in the stone, not by violence, but by oft falling.
-Proverbs, Datalinks

cards.name: Mindjack
cards.card_effect: Look at target opponent’s hand. Choose a non-Echo card and add it to your hand.
cards.flavor_text: He felt his mind disconnect from his body - just a plug coming undone and then darkness.

cards.name: Nerve Splice
cards.card_effect: Flip X T on target Citadel. Any player attacking you has +1 breach value.
cards.flavor_text: A necessary atrocity.

cards.name: Neural Amp
cards.card_effect: This unit gains +2 Attack.
cards.flavor_text: Amplify your ideals, send them out among your troops, and they will tear your enemies asunder.

cards.name: Nodal Addicts
cards.card_effect:
You must put a T from your Citadel on this unit during your growth phase, or scrap it.
If attacking and breaching, you may scrap health from this unit. Scrap a citizen from the opposing colony for each health lost.

cards.name: Pleasure Dome
cards.card_effect: TT➤ You may add one additional T to your Citadel during your growth phase.

cards.name: Punishment Chamber
cards.card_effect:
D: Add 2 to a Forge card.
Scrap all citizens on this facility during your upkeep.
cards.flavor_text: Fear will keep the rabble in line.

cards.name: Recycling Vats
cards.card_effect: Health lost from units you control may be placed on this facility instead of scrapped.
cards.flavor_text: It is every citizen’s final duty.

cards.name: Rut Hollow
cards.card_effect: DD➤ Add a D to your Citadel during your growth phase.
cards.flavor_text: They can see the glint of the pleasure dome reflecting like a diamond, a kilometer above the hollow.

cards.name: Scav Gang
cards.card_effect:
Squad (This unit gets +1 Attack for every health on it.)
If this unit deals lethal damage, take an augment from that unit and attach it to Scav Gang.

cards.name: Secret Police
cards.card_effect: Flip a T on your Citadel during your upkeep or scrap Secret Police.

cards.name: Sporemask
cards.card_effect: This unit has +1 Armor.
cards.flavor_text: Fungus mats convert organic matter into a thick sludge in hours - the masks prevent this conversion within the lungs.

cards.name: Stimshifts
cards.card_effect: Each citizen used to work this facility counts as two. Any citizens removed from this facility are scrapped.
cards.flavor_text: One Drone can work twice as hard for half the life.

cards.name: Titan Cannon
cards.card_effect: D: Deal 1 damage to target unit and each adjacent unit.
cards.flavor_text: In the recoil there is a hollow quiet, as the planet holds its breath.

cards.name: Vir Ex Machina
cards.card_effect:
Search a scrap for a unit, and forge it immediately into the back of one of your lanes. Attach this augment.
If this augment is ever removed, scrap the attached unit.

cards.name: Walker Artillery
cards.card_effect:
You may target a Citadel or facility during your upkeep. Its controller chooses a citizen there and scraps it.
Splash (When this unit deals combat damage, deal the same damage to the next enemy unit.)
